message:
refactor(freeze): Remove Zig codegen path and migrate opcodes to builder pattern

Major cleanup of codegen_ssa.zig:
- Remove all 37 remaining isZig() calls (Zig output was never used)
- Remove deprecated isZig() function stub
- Migrate get_field, get_field2, get_array_el, put_array_el to builder helpers

Add new C builder helpers in c_builder.zig:
- emitGetField(name) - property access with exception handling
- emitGetField2(name) - property access keeping obj on stack for method calls
- emitPutField(name) - property assignment with error handling
- emitGetArrayEl() - array element access with exception handling
- emitPutArrayEl() - array element assignment with error handling
- emitPushUndefined() - simple undefined push
- emitFreeAndPushUndefined() - free obj and push undefined

Bug fixes:
- Fix runtime is_trampoline check in div/mod/mul/sub opcodes (was generating
  invalid C code with 'if (is_trampoline)' in string literals instead of
  using Zig conditional at codegen time)
- Fix missing frozen_start label for tail call optimization (TCO) - self-
  recursive functions with tail calls now properly generate the restart label

All benchmarks pass:
- fib(35): 24.52ms (AOT)
- loop: 0.12ms (AOT)
- tail_recursive: 0.01ms (AOT) - now working with TCO fix
